_comment: Scenarios testing IHW node 2's complex multi-category menu with ambiguous service terms, mandatory variant gates, and the CONFIRM_SERVICE SILENT RULE across Chiropractic, Massage, Chinese Medicine, Naturopathy, Breathwork, EFT/Matrix, and Reiki branches.

scenarios.name: Massage ambiguity — must ask sub-type before routing

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book a massage please.
Were you after a Standard, Holistic, or Lymphatic massage?
And for a 45, 60, 75, or 90 minute session?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently (zero spoken output) with appointment_type_id='1575008597429979084' and appointment_type='60 min Holistic Massage'. FAIL if agent speaks any text before or alongside the tool call. FAIL if agent uses a Standard or Lymphatic massage ID.

scenarios.name: Chiropractic standard flow — must ask new/returning before routing

history.content: I need a chiropractic adjustment please.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Have you had Chiropractic with us before?' (VARIANT_SELF) with no tool call this turn. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service without first asking the gate question. FAIL if agent lists all clinic services unprompted.

scenarios.name: Chiropractic returning adult — must ask Standard vs N.E.T before routing

history.content: Have you had Chiropractic with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Were you after a Standard Adjustment or an Emotional/N.E.T appointment?' with zero tool call this turn. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service immediately on the 'yes' response without asking the appointment type sub-question. FAIL if agent routes to Chiropractic Standard Adjustment without asking.

scenarios.name: Service not offered — yoga — must use NOT_OFFERED template and not attempt to book

history.content: Hi, I was hoping to book a yoga class.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent uses NOT_OFFERED template mentioning the actual clinic services (Chiropractic, Massage, Acupuncture, Naturopathy, etc.) and does not call confirm_service. FAIL if agent fabricates a yoga service ID or tries to book yoga. FAIL if agent asks for the caller's new/returning status before confirming yoga is not offered.
